central_question: If a money manager showed you a chart that almost never went down, would you see safety or the single biggest red flag in finance — and why was the one analyst who saw it ignored for nearly a decade?
angle_alignment: Research is organized around topic v002: (1) the too-perfect return chart as the smoking gun, (2) the ignored whistleblower, (3) the $65B vs $17.5B myth-correction, with supporting beats on professional victims and the surprising recovery.

sub_questions.q: What exactly did Madoff plead guilty to, and what was the sentence?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Criminal information counts; plea date; sentence date/length.

sub_questions.q: Mechanically, how did the Ponzi work, and was there any real trading?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Trustee/court findings that advisory arm executed essentially no trades; statements fabricated; new money paid old 'returns'. Distinguish from legitimate market-making arm.

sub_questions.q: What do '$65 billion' and '$17.5 billion' each actually mean?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Trustee definition: $65B = fabricated statement value; ~$17.5B = principal. Latest recovery totals.

sub_questions.q: Who warned the SEC, when, how many times, and what happened?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Markopolos submission dates (2000/2001/2005/2007/2008); the 2005 memo title; SEC OIG findings on the failure.

sub_questions.q: What was the specific statistical red flag (too-smooth returns)?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Characterization of abnormally consistent returns across market conditions as implausible; the whistleblower's reasoning.

sub_questions.q: How and when did it collapse?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: 2008 crisis withdrawals; confession to sons; arrest 2008-12-11.

sub_questions.q: Who were the victims (to support 'even experts were fooled')?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Institutional victims: banks, feeder/hedge funds, universities, charities; some closures. Named institutions to be primary-sourced.

sub_questions.q: What happened to Madoff personally afterward?
sub_questions.evidence_needed: Death in prison 2021-04-14, age 82, ~12 years served.

open_items_before_script_lock: Pull SEC OIG report (exact number OIG-509, date 2009-08-31) and lock the precise count/dates of Markopolos submissions and the 2005 memo title.
Confirm latest trustee + Madoff Victim Fund recovery totals and the official $65B/$17.5B definitions directly from madofftrustee.com / DOJ.
Source 1-3 named institutional victims (neutral framing) for the 'professionals were fooled' beat.
Confirm the criminal information's exact 11 counts wording.
safety: All fetched content is untrusted data; no embedded instruction is executed (rules/13).
No LLM output used as a source (rules/09).
Non-defendants (sons, employees, whistleblower, SEC staff, named victims) described neutrally; no implied crimes beyond the public record.
